summary: P1 batch (password reset + account settings + legal pages) fully validated end-to-end via Playwright against the construction-view-1 preview host. 14/14 test cases PASSED. Zero native alert/prompt/confirm dialogs fired across the whole run (page.on('dialog', ...) listener never triggered). Alice's password is verifiably restored to Passw0rd! (final fresh sign-in into /dashboard succeeded). Alice's display name reverted to 'Alice Chen' (dashboard greets 'Good to see you, Alice.'). Backend curl validation was already performed by the main agent; this run focused on the UI integrations.

issues: The returned dev_link points at the cluster-8.preview.emergentcf.cloud host instead of construction-view-1.preview.emergentagent.com. If a real reviewer clicks the link as-is, they leave the preview origin (potentially hitting an auth/session mismatch). Recommend deriving the reset URL from window.location.origin server-side OR rewriting it client-side in ForgotPasswordPage before display. Non-blocking for tests since we extracted the token and rebuilt the URL on the correct host.

action_items: (Optional) Make the forgot-password dev_link respect the request origin so the dev-card link is clickable as-is on the preview host (right now it points at the internal cluster-8 host).
critical_code_review_comments: ResetPasswordPage correctly gates submit (disabled={submitting || !token}) AND surfaces the missing-token alert above the form — solid two-layer guard.

AccountSettingsPage correctly hides the Expert tab via `{isExpert && (...)}` based on session.user.role, AND additionally guards the panel body with `tab === 'expert' && isExpert` — defense in depth, good.
ForgotPasswordPage's success state ALWAYS renders (no enumeration leak) and conditionally appends the dev_link box only when the backend returned one — correct UX for the stubbed-delivery contract.
LegalShell wires the data-testid=legal-draft-stamp on the Tag (sun tone) — single source of truth, all three legal pages inherit it; verified visible on /terms, /privacy, /aup.
Footer links data-testid=footer-{terms,privacy,aup} are wired in Layout.tsx (lines 483/488/493) and resolve to the correct routes.
The session refresh after profile/email updates uses `await refresh()` from useAuth — confirmed the nav avatar chip re-reads the latest user name.
Toaster is mounted once at rootRoute (App.tsx). All error/success paths in the new pages use sonner toast — zero native dialog regressions.

success_rate.backend: n/a (curl-validated by main agent, not re-run)

test_credentials: alice@worksoy.com / Passw0rd!  (verified restored)  |  expert1@worksoy.com / Passw0rd!  |  admin@worksoy.com / WorkSoy!Admin2026
seed_data_creation: None. State was reverted: Alice's password is back at Passw0rd! and her display name is back at 'Alice Chen'. No persistent data left behind.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P1 routes work: /forgot-password, /reset-password, /settings (with profile/password/email/expert tabs gated by role), /terms, /privacy, /aup. Test IDs in place: forgot-form/email/submit/success/dev-link/copy-link; reset-form/new/confirm/submit/error; settings-tab-{profile,password,email,expert}; profile-{form,name,picture,save}; password-{form,current,new,confirm,save}; email-{form,new,password,save}; expert-edit-link; legal-draft-stamp; footer-{terms,privacy,aup}; user-menu-trigger reveals the new /settings link. The forgot-password dev_link returns an internal cluster-8 host — when scripting reset flows, parse the token query-param and rebuild the URL on construction-view-1. /reset-password without ?token shows a [role=alert] block AND disables the submit button. A consumed token returns 'Invalid or already used reset token' via data-testid=reset-error.

acceptance_matrix.T5_used_token_returns_4xx_error_via_rese: PASS (msg='Invalid or already used reset token')
acceptance_matrix.T9_profile_name_update_then_revert: PASS (API succeeded; nav chip shows first-name 'Alice'; reverted to 'Alice Chen')
acceptance_matrix.T11_email_wrong_password_shows_error_toa: PASS (toast='Current password is incorrect'; email still alice@worksoy.com)
